title: Add authentication to commit and push
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds authentication to commit and push, including script that can be run at the command line to test.  Updates to *.bats tests will be added in a follow up.

comments.body: @Spindel another buildah auth submit that may be of interest.
Docs and command completion nits, otherwise LGTM.
A couple of changes to wrap errors to be more helpful for debugging, otherwise LGTM.

:pushpin: Commit 1a28159 has been approved by `nalind`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=nalind 1a2815973d2f5af890946a2489584092c82dfc7f -->
@nalind The last change that I pushed touched up the errors to use Wrapf as you requested.  I did the same for from.go too.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/c9c735e20de41f20e712e3839b18ef103f6ec538.1504020904263723008/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
